criteria.criterion: PutSegment delegates to catalog/content, returns correct results for fixture request
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/PutSegment_Create and /PutSegment_Append: assert response file_id/new_version match direct catalog.Get + ContentStore.Read results

criteria.criterion: GetFile delegates to catalog/content, returns correct results for fixture request
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/GetFile: assert response content/version match direct ContentStore.Read + Catalog.Get results for a pre-created fixture file

criteria.criterion: ReadPartial delegates to catalog/content, returns correct results for fixture request
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/ReadPartial: assert response headers match direct ContentStore.ReadPartial results for fixture markdown content with headers

criteria.criterion: GraphNeighbors delegates to graph, returns correct results for fixture request
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/GraphNeighbors: build a fixture CSRGraph with known edges, assert response neighbors match direct graph.GraphNeighbors results (target/type/weight); TestEdgeTypeConversion covers the proto<->graph enum mapping explicitly

criteria.criterion: SearchCandidates delegates to btree, returns correct results for fixture request
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/SearchCandidates: build a fixture B+Tree with known paths, assert response candidates match direct btree.PrefixScan results for a given prefix query

criteria.criterion: Errors map to appropriate gRPC status codes
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/NotFound_* subtests assert codes.NotFound for unknown fileID across PutSegment(append)/GetFile/ReadPartial; TestRPCServerHandlers/InvalidArgument_* asserts codes.InvalidArgument for out-of-range GraphNeighbors depth/maxNodes

criteria.criterion: ProposeSplit correctly out of scope for 3.2.2
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/ProposeSplit_Unimplemented: assert calling ProposeSplit on the Server returns codes.Unimplemented (generated default, unmodified)

criteria.criterion: gRPC server handling concurrent requests against shared engine state is race-safe
criteria.check: TestRPCServerHandlers/Concurrent: N goroutines issuing GetFile/GraphNeighbors concurrently against the same Server, run with -race

criteria.criterion: Go discipline: gofmt/go vet/go build clean
criteria.check: self-consistency.json records gofmt -l (empty), go vet ./..., go build ./... all clean
